results.title: Coroner IDs man found dead from gunshot wounds in Delano
results.description: A 54-year-old Delano man who was found dead May 19 after suffering a fatal gunshot wound has been identified by the Kern County coroner’s office.

results.description: Ten area nonprofit organizations received grants Wednesday through the Rotary Club of Carbondale during the club’s annual community grant presentation at Hickory Ridge Public Golf Center.

results.title: How centuries of Hajj journeys were written into memory
results.description: article author: Tareq Al-Thaqafi Author: Wed, 2026-05-20 22:38 MAKKAH: For centuries, the Hajj pilgrimage has been a journey unlike any other, one in which the punishing demands of the road have been inseparable from the spiritual weight of the destination. The pilgrim caravans of the past paint a human and devotional canvas without parallel, faithfully chronicled by travelers and historians whose books and manuscripts now rank among the most valuable historical witnesses to how this sacred rite evolved. Main category: Saudi Arabia Tags: Hajj 2026

results.title: ND Highway Patrol K9 units credited with helping locate missing juvenile
results.description: The North Dakota Highway Patrol said a pair of man-trailing K9s played a key role in locating a missing juvenile in Rolette County on Tuesday.

results.title: Republican Senator Says Trump Ballroom Funding Removed From Spending Bill
results.description: Republican Senator John Kennedy on Wednesday said there was insufficient support in the Senate to spend $1 billion on a planned White House ballroom and related security measures, and that the proposal would not be included in a $72 billion immigration enforcement bill.
